re_viewer0.24.0-alpha.1

DimAdd

Required Associated Types

  • Output

Implementors

In re_viewer::external::re_types::external::ndarray

re_viewer::external::re_types::external::ndarray

Trait DimAdd

Source 
pub trait DimAdd<D>
where
    D: Dimension,
{
    type Output: Dimension;
}
Expand description

Adds the two dimensions at compile time.

Required Associated Types§

Source

type Output: Dimension

The sum of the two dimensions.
